enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Makkayala Makkayala?

The song conveys a playful and flirtatious vibe, celebrating attraction and connection between two people.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Naan?

In Naan, the song is set during a lively party scene, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Makkayala Makkayala?

The song features vocals by Krishan Maheson, Mark, and Shakthisree Gopalan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Makkayala Makkayala was composed by Vijay Antony.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 6, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Makkayala Makkayala is an upbeat and energetic song that captures the essence of youthful romance and celebration. Set against the backdrop of a vibrant party in the movie Naan, the track showcases the playful banter between the lead characters. The catchy lyrics by Priyan and the lively composition by Vijay Antony evoke feelings of joy and excitement. This song is perfect for any festive occasion, making it a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Makkayala Makkayala from Naan is a vibrant celebration of love and energy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Krishan Maheson, Mark, and Shakthisree Gopalan. With Vijay Antony's dynamic music and Priyan's catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious beats and lively vibes that make this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: You are the hot type, I'm the rock type. You are the fly type, I'm the right type. When the bass drops, you know what to do. When the beat drops, you know what to do. Holla holla baby, holla at this thug. Holla holla baby, holla at this thing.
Makkayala Makkayala, come here, Makkayala Makkayala, come here, Makkayala Makkayala, come here, yela yela yela.
There is no support for the young. There is no clarity for the eyes. We have no legs on this earth today... no... no... no... no.
There is no gathering in loneliness, there is no joy in standing alone. Even the wind has no burden, nothing is wrong with mistakes (Makkayala ...).
No sleep at night, non-stop fun until dawn. No decrease in our colorful dreams, never.
The time of yesterday is gone, tomorrow's time is a dream, today’s time is ours... ours.
Non-stop joy if friends come together... mmmmm... Crores of desires will knock on the door... yei yei... (Makkayala ..)
You got to wait in the party. I got to tell you what's up. I got the top type of hustlers who want to step into this club.
It doesn't matter, you're not kids... actually glow WiFi... We got to move, yo dolls, pills babe... so you're high.
You know you got me saying I'm really bad like Michael Jackson, deciding to propel like in action.
Haul like a guy's thing, haul like a vulture, fly like Superman, fly on departure.
No time concerns for friendship, non-stop chatting once started. No distance here... no... no.
Don’t hide anything within you, you don’t get another chance. It's only one life... don’t forget.
Lying on a friend's shoulder will heal all problems... oh... in bad and good times, friendship can handle all problems. yei yei... oh (Makkayala ..)
Teenage never hesitates... no shyness while alone... (Makkayala ..)
